member.name: M:ETHAN.classes.HexEncoding.GetBytes(System.String,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Creates a byte array from the hexadecimal string. Each two characters are combined to create one byte. First two hexadecimal characters become first byte in returned array. Non-hexadecimal characters are ignored.
member.param: string to convert to byte array
number of characters in string ignored
member.returns: byte array, in the same left-to-right order as the hexString

member.name: M:ETHAN.classes.HexEncoding.InHexFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Determines if given string is in proper hexadecimal string format

member.name: M:ETHAN.classes.HexEncoding.IsHexDigit(System.Char)
member.summary: Returns true is c is a hexadecimal digit (A-F, a-f, 0-9)
member.param: Character to test
member.returns: true if hex digit, false if not

member.name: M:ETHAN.classes.HexEncoding.HexToByte(System.String)
member.summary: Converts 1 or 2 character string into equivalant byte value
member.param: 1 or 2 character string

member.name: M:ETHAN.Network.NetworkHelper.IsConnected
member.summary: Returns true if device has an active internet connection (WiFi or Mobile Data).

member.name: M:ETHAN.Network.NetworkHelper.IsConnectedWifi
member.summary: Returns true if device is connected via WiFi.

member.name: M:ETHAN.Network.NetworkHelper.IsConnectedMobile
member.summary: Returns true if device is connected via Mobile Data.

member.name: M:ETHAN.Network.NetworkHelper.IsDisconnected
member.summary: Returns true if device has NO WiFi and NO Mobile Data.

member.name: T:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.ProgressDialogService
member.summary: Implementation of IProgressDialogService for .NET MAUI

member.name: T:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.ProgressDialogServiceExtensions
member.summary: Extension method to register the ProgressDialogService

member.name: T:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.IProgressDialogService
member.summary: Service for managing progress dialogs in .NET MAUI applications

member.name: M:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.IProgressDialogService.ShowAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Shows a progress dialog with a specified message
member.param: The message to display in the progress dialog

member.name: M:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.IProgressDialogService.ShowAsync(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Shows a progress dialog with a message and progress percentage
member.param: The message to display in the progress dialog
The progress percentage (0-100)

member.name: M:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.IProgressDialogService.UpdateProgressAsync(System.Double)
member.summary: Updates the progress of the currently displayed dialog
member.param: The new progress percentage (0-100)

member.name: M:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.IProgressDialogService.UpdateMessageAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the message of the currently displayed dialog
member.param: The new message to display

member.name: M:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.IProgressDialogService.DismissAsync
member.summary: Dismisses the current progress dialog

member.name: M:ETHAN.ProgressDialog.UiPump.Yield
member.summary: Forces Android UI thread to complete one full render frame. Required after PushModalAsync / DisplayAlert / overlays.

member.name: T:ETHAN.Views.BarcodeScanningPage
member.summary: sample code from https://github.com/Redth/ZXing.Net.Maui

members.member: ======= use cvInvP1OnItemTap instead of cvInvP1OnItemSelected for multiple tap ======= SelectionChanged by default only respond to a single tap, marking an item as selected
Open URL in the device's default browser
Optional: Use a more advanced in-app browser (like SafariViewController / Chrome Custom Tabs)
Open URL in the device's default browser

member.name: M:ETHAN.XDelSys.ClientFlags.HasFlag(System.Int32,ETHAN.XDelSys.ClientFlags.Flag)
member.summary: Has the flag (all bits in AFlags must be inside IntFlag)

member.summary: Has the flag (all bits in AFlags must be inside IntFlag)

member.name: M:ETHAN.XDelSys.Holiday.vGetNextWorkingDay(System.DateTime,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the next working day, deducts DaysAhead if holiday or Sat/Sun is encountered
member.param: If set to true, DaysAhead will not be deducted when encountering holiday or Sat/Sun

member.name: T:ETHAN.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.PropertyName
member.summary: Name of the Attached Property

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.IsNullable
member.summary: Should generate a nullable type for T

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.DefaultValue
member.summary: The default value for the property

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.DefaultBindingMode
member.summary: The BindingMode to use on SetBinding() if no BindingMode is given. Default is

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.ValidateValueMethodName
member.summary: Method name for to be run when a value is set. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.PropertyChangedMethodName
member.summary: Method name for to be run when a value has changed. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.PropertyChangingMethodName
member.summary: Method name for to be run when a value is set. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.CoerceValueMethodName
member.summary: Method name for used to coerce the range of a value. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.DefaultValueCreatorMethodName
member.summary: Method name for used to initialize default value for reference types. Default value is null

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.BindablePropertyXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Custom XML Comments added to BindableProperty
member.remarks: Must be the entire XML string, including ///

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.GetterMethodXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Custom XML Comments added to Get{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable)
member.remarks: Must be the entire XML string, including ///

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.SetterMethodXmlDocumentation
member.summary: Custom XML Comments added to Set{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable, T value)
member.remarks: Must be the entire XML string, including ///

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.BindablePropertyAccessibility
member.summary: The access modifier applied to the generated field

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.GetterAccessibility
member.summary: The access modifier applied to the generated method Get{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable)

member.name: P:CommunityToolkit.Maui.AttachedBindablePropertyAttribute`1.SetterAccessibility
member.summary: The access modifier applied to the generated method Set{PropertyName}(BindableProperty bindable, T value)
